Settings.ProtonUrlHint: Local address of the RPGX Proton desktop app (default: http://127.0.0.1:3033). Download Proton free at rpgxstudios.com.
Settings.OllamaModelHint: The Ollama model used for AI quest generation. Must be installed in Ollama via RPGX Proton. (e.g. llama3, qwen2.5:7b, mistral)

Errors.FreeTierLimit: Free tier limit reached (10 quests). Premium features require the RPGX Proton desktop app — download free at rpgxstudios.com.
Errors.ProtonRequired: RPGX Proton is required for this feature. Download free at rpgxstudios.com.
Errors.ProtonNotDetected: RPGX Proton is not running. Start Proton to unlock premium features.
Errors.OllamaFailed: Could not reach RPGX Proton. Make sure Proton is running on your computer.
Errors.NoAssignees: No characters assigned to this quest.

Confirm.DeleteQuest: Are you sure you want to delete this quest? This cannot be undone.

Awards.RewardsRevealed: Quest rewards are now visible to players.
